str_A3360152: The first thing I remember is the sound of waves, lazily tearing the fabric of the sea against the coastal rocks. The smell of salt, scratching my throat like a blade.
str_BE0AC531: I feel everything dry in my mouth, my lips cracked.
str_94EE0452: I feel a pain wrapping around my entire body.
str_E110A859: I open my eyes and see the daytime sun. Turning my head sideways – a rocky shore and waves, moving back and forth, stealing small pebbles into their boundless bosom.
str_915090ED: How did I get here? What is this place? And why does it hurt so much?
str_1D884264: I try to get up. Everything is spinning before my eyes.
str_8EFACE46: My hands and feet are covered in small cuts. I must have fallen right onto the rocks. My knees are scraped.
str_12151F38: Attempts to understand where I am have yielded no results. Just a beach, probably a wild one, since there isn't a single person here.
str_B6219402: A thought flashes through my mind: 'Where is Miranda?'
str_1730BA77: I need to find her. I need to get back to the tent.
str_62BC76FF: My phone, like all my other things, wasn't next to me. How am I supposed to know which way to go?
str_80DA794F: Slowly, through the aching pain all over my body, I trudged to the right.
str_0C7E035A: Five minutes later, I approached some thick bushes blocking the path to the road.
str_B71DD8FB: My attention was caught by the silhouette of a man rinsing his shoes in the water.
str_676C7B4E: I need to go over and find out where I am.
str_267EEBE0: As I got closer, I called out to the man.
str_4AA9C4C7: Tom turned to face me. The same guy I met yesterday at the club.
str_B67103D5: I hesitated for a moment before bombarding him with questions about what was happening.
str_DFF3625B: What happened last night? And most importantly, where are we?
str_878D8D3F: Seems like I'm no help to you here. The last time I saw you was at the club.
str_07064B8A: Then what are you doing here?
str_AFE55583: I like to run in the mornings. It got hot, and I decided to get my clothes wet.
str_EDA5000C: A wild beach near Grosser Mond.
str_6623E6F6: Just tell me how to get back to the wild beach by the club.
str_3EBD70CB: You went the wrong way. Go along the left bank.
str_9B42CA2B: Did you notice anything strange yesterday?
str_19324097: No. Except that you got into a fight with your friend. Don't you remember?
str_70AB7467: I don't remember anything after that cocktail you gave me.
str_6C15EC20: Could a couple of cocktails erase an entire night from your memory? Or was it not just them?
str_2E8DD8FD: You know, I don't think you're who you pretend to be. There's too much falseness in you. Maybe you're even lying to yourself.
str_1DAF4217: Your eyes yesterday, they were so angry, you were simply burning with sinful flame of hatred for everything and everyone.
str_BBCBEFD0: The guy smiled slyly at me. His eyes seemed to turn black, and his words rang in my ears with a hoarse rasp.
str_F35C6DC5: Maybe you're not pretending, or maybe you don't even know who you are yourself.
str_E1002B27: I went left in search of at least some familiar places.
str_B370A33D: The morning sun didn't seem to be very hot, but dehydration and a headache turned my path into a hellish labyrinth of similar-looking rocks and sand.
str_A91EDFCF: The road seemed endless, but figures of people began to appear on the beach.
str_CEFA920E: One of them looked piercingly into my eyes.
str_4D5FD053: It was a man, an old man. He looked too strange, even for a place like this.
str_B8101830: Yes, I'm lost, but I think I know where to go.
str_B9F0A4C5: The old man looked at me kindly and smiled.
str_FA3EDFFA: My name is Samuel Hosea, and I am a wanderer, so I can't offer you much, but there is one thing. Sometimes I see what was and what will be, and I can predict your path.
str_0F33CC6B: Well then, go in peace, child.
str_A4B76015: Come closer and let me look into your eyes.
str_2855FEC3: The old man's gaze seemed to make my soul shudder.
str_33E9BAA7: Pictures from my memories, my life, flashed through my mind like slides.
str_A83C67F6: I see something sinister surrounding you. You shouldn't trust those you barely know, and you shouldn't even believe yourself.
str_E2A1C1AE: You have a difficult path ahead, and it's only up to you what kind of person you come out of this city as.
str_1D695D39: That didn't clarify much for me.
str_E8D1F9AB: However, that's all I can tell you for now. Your destiny will be rewritten, and I cannot see its outcome.
str_E899159E: Okay, thanks. I have to go.
str_A1C75C6B: I continued on my way to the wild beach. Familiar landscapes began to flicker before my eyes.
str_BFAA885E: Thoughts and guesses swirled in my head. What happened yesterday?
str_D2C27EC9: Before me appeared yellow tape and a bunch of police officers cordoning off the beach area.
str_EBEBBCF6: Among the crowd of onlookers, I saw two familiar silhouettes. It was Edwin and Mark.
str_26285779: I immediately walked over to the guys.
str_C0DEEDCF: The guys exchanged a strange glance.
str_9602887A: No! I woke up on some rocky beach and I don't remember anything that happened.
str_A6092EC9: In that pause, my whole life flashed before my eyes.
str_641091E0: Come on, tell me what happened!
str_9AEE06FA: Miranda is dead. It seems she was killed. We saw the body when we came by boat to check on you.
str_565FA41D: You have a good relationship with Edwin
str_5B89A450: You have a good relationship with Mark
str_F1BB40F8: Alice, the thing is, Miranda is dead, and her body was found just recently, right here on the beach.
str_EBC1A3C2: You don't have a good enough relationship with the guys
str_4F737AA6: You better tell us what happened!
str_9BB0FE35: I don't know what you're talking about!
str_4C80208D: We found Miranda's body when we came by boat to check on you.
str_42EE69FD: Body? What, what did you say?
str_BE3E04C6: What did you do to her?!
str_7C1B61C4: Look at yourself! You're covered in wounds. You obviously did this!
str_D9CB1D3A: Everything went dark before my eyes.
str_4CD5AE00: I don't understand how this could have happened.
str_AEFA1DFF: When I came to, I saw a police officer approaching me.
str_2E22B14D: Good afternoon, as I understand it, you are Alice. Correct?
str_6CD85781: I ask you to come to the station to give a statement!
str_90FB77CB: Officer, I think you should detain her. She was the last one with Miranda!
str_8612CBBA: You are all suspects until evidence proves otherwise! So I'll decide what to do myself.
str_9861049E: Guys, read her her rights and put on the handcuffs.
str_65978F7A: What? But I'm not guilty of anything!
str_7A262012: The officer led me to the police car.
str_19AC4DE0: Officer, I don't think she's guilty. Maybe Alice is a victim too!
str_403944A5: Okay, but you'll still have to come with me to the station!
str_A2537325: Officer, wait! You don't even know what happened yet! I know this girl and I think she's innocent!
str_7A5E45DD: The guys looked at me contemptuously and left.
str_991CCB32: Approaching the car, I couldn't believe everything that was happening.
str_5D211240: Turning around, I saw Miranda's body behind the closing doors of an ambulance.
